title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: an allegorical short story on the emotional coercion of voters
description: Unlike high-pitched electioneering the State is known for, the TVK’s campaign seems in part to be unfolding quietly within households. What unfolds is reminiscent of the short story Marumagal Vaaku (Dauther-in-law’s Vote) by the late Tamil writer Krishnan Nambi
